samples:
I hope you know what you're thinking
Hope you know just what you mean to say
If not, I suggest that you practice your aim


You wanna kill someone? Go right ahead
Yeah, hey, hey, hey, hey, yeah
Yeah, hey, hey, hey, hey, yeah
Hey, hey, hey, hey, yeah


Let me introduce you to the other side
This is a little piece of my mind
It's cold and lonely without you there
I wanna give it all to you, baby
Trust in me and do what I must
I want to show you something different
Something darker and so much more
Just remember this: You will never come back here again


Fuck you and fuck every little piece of you
Fuck everything you think you are
Don't point your finger at me while you whistle "fuck you"
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey

I've got the blues
And I must mention my heartaches


Well, it seems to me
A little like a tempest to me
I'm scared of what may come through
If we just keep on digging ourselves in two
But if you give some thought
To all these little things that weigh us down
We could sure use some sort of center or foundation
Some kind of anchor to keep this ship from sinking


What are we gonna do?
You know there is no way out but one


Hey now hey now hey now hey now
Anchor and Center
Something that keeps our heads above water
Anchors and centers
Something that keeps our heads above water
Yeah yeah


Just thinking about where I would be
If only someone had told me where I was going
Thinkin' about where I would have been
If only someone had told me where I was going
Someone here should whistle a warning
Shoutin' "Anchors away! Anchors away!"
Yeah, anchors aweigh

My little angel, you're the light that guides me
Even though I have to make a sacrifice
Every day and every night


I remember when my soul came down here to save a little angel, now a demon in disguise
I just wanted to open up your eyes so you would see what all this is about
If I didn’t care for you, you know I sure as hell wouldn't be around
Shrouding you with fear and turning you away
Don't you dare point your finger at me
Trust in me, give yourself away Trust in me, there's no other way
Open up your heart, you must feel this coming over me like an avalanche
You must realize it will take everything you have to sustain me

I am nothing but a worthless liar, a hypocrite, a thief and a liar
But believe in me and change along with me until the end of time
If I didn't care for you, you know I sure as hell wouldn't be around
Shrouding you with fear and turning you away
Don't you dare point your finger at me
Trust in me, trust in me now and we both can learn something
Learn together through our love

I know that you well
You have been in my mind, lately
And if I'm honest with myself
It feels good to think about you


But then you call me up and say
"I wanna fuckin' fight ya"
Well, listen here, buddy
Don't you ever call me that again
Fuck it, don't you dare


You know that we both want this
We both want this so bad
Both of us are frightened
So why don't we do what's right?


Why can't you just whistle a little bit?
Whistle while I get comfortable
Take the piss out of your patience
Just whistle while I get comfortable


Then we'll whistle a little bit
Whisper while we get comfortable
Take the piss out of your patience
Just whistle while I get comfortable

Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
Get comfortable

I remember you
All the time, all the time
Yeah, I do, yeah, I do


Don't wanna feel alone
But it's alright and we both know it
If you leave I will survive just fine
We can live through this together


When I was a little one
You told me what to be
What to think, what to say
You wanted so much of me


You said you loved me
Well then why'd ya push me down?
Why did you point your finger at me
And act like I had no center now?
It hurt to see you push me
Then watch me stumble on my way back up


Well, I got off okay, well, kinda


Hey, hey, hey, hey
 Hey, hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey, hey

This has happened before
There is nothing new under the sun
"Mother Mary", I whisper "Mary Mary
Won't you whistle something?"

Now, don't you dare tell me
How or when or where or how many times that I must get up
I thought I told you
Fuck you, Mary Ann, fuck you

Yeah, yeah
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey, hey


This is just a little reminder to you that we're leaving soon
You are gonna miss me and you'd better learn to swim
I am thinking of my way back home and swimming through the river
Learning how to swim will help you get over me


Swim away from me, swim away from me now
Learn to swim or else you'll drown

I wanna swim some laps around your heart until it beats so slow
I swim to free your soul and save you from this hopeless hole
The only reason I'm wearing this skin-tight black leather bikini
Is to remind you what you could have been if only you tried


Swim away from me, swim away from me now
Learn to swim or else you'll drown
Learn to swim or else you'll drown




What did he say? What did she say?
It's like swimming in water made of molasses
Slowly pull me under as you slowly take my breath away
Don't blink too fast, don't slip away, remember one thing while you breathe away
You may not survive but someone has to because someone must stay alive today

Fuck you, fuck you, fuck you
Fuck you, fuck you, fuck you
Fuck you, fuck you, fuck you

Just do exactly what I tell you to do.
Don't question anything that I say.

Follow me and everything will be just fine.
This conversation is becoming tiresome.

Don't even think about making me come down off of my fucking pedestal.
Don't you dare suggest a change. You can't handle it.
Trust in me. Trust me when I say that this must go on.
Otherwise there's no way we can reach our potential.
